info.description: Nigeria's Graduate Career Intelligence Platform API
info.title: GradConnect API

get.description:
Returns aggregated counts, 30-day time-series data, top employers,
top opportunities, and recent job runs in a single response.
Requires admin:full permission.
List all assessment profiles across all employers, with employer stub embedded.

parameters.description: Search programme type or employer name (case-insensitive substring)
parameters.name: q

post.description: Creates an assessment profile for an employer. Requires admin:full permission.

get.description: Fetch a single assessment by UUID with employer stub embedded.

patch.description: Updates an assessment profile. Requires admin:full permission and current version.

post.description: Creates a new employer profile. Requires admin:full permission.

get.description: Get a full employer hub profile by id

delete.description: Deletes an employer and cascades to related records. Requires admin:full permission.

patch.description: Updates an existing employer profile. Requires admin:full permission.

get.description: Returns the most recent import jobs, newest first. Requires admin:full permission.

post.description: Accepts a CSV file and queues an async import job. Requires admin:full permission.
post.summary: Start a bulk data import (admin only)

get.description: Returns the current status and results of an import job. Requires admin:full permission.

post.description:
Deletes all expired sessions from the database. Returns the count deleted.
Safe to run multiple times. Requires admin:full permission.

Manually fires the deadline reminder enqueue job. Useful for testing in staging,
recovery from a missed cron, or admin-initiated re-runs. Returns the count of
reminder jobs queued for execution. Requires admin:full permission.
post.summary: Trigger the deadline reminder enqueue job

post.description:
Recomputes cached avg_difficulty_rating, avg_experience_rating, and
review_count for every employer. Returns the number of employers processed.
Requires admin:full permission.

get.description:
List all graduate opportunities including closed and withdrawn.
Admin-only ledger view of every record on the platform regardless of status.

parameters.description: Keyword search across title, employer name, location, discipline, industry, requirements, and description
parameters.name: q

parameters.description: Filter by computed status. Admins may request any status, including closed and withdrawn, or 'all' to see every status.
parameters.name: status

parameters.description: Show opportunities with deadline before this date (YYYY-MM-DD)
parameters.name: deadline_before

parameters.description: Show opportunities with deadline after this date (YYYY-MM-DD)
parameters.name: deadline_after

parameters.description: Sort field (prefix with - for descending). Defaults to newest-first for admin moderation workflows.
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: Items per page (max 50). Higher default than the public endpoint for bulk admin operations.
parameters.name: page_size

post.description: Creates a new opportunity listing. Requires admin:full permission.

get.description: Get a full opportunity profile by id

delete.description: Deletes an opportunity. Requires admin:full permission.

patch.description: Updates an existing opportunity. Requires admin:full permission.

get.description:
Generates a PNG image of a job opportunity for Social Media posts.
Safe to run multiple times. Requires admin:full permission.
get.summary: Generate social media post for opportunity

200.description: PNG image of the opportunity card

get.description: Returns reviews filtered by status for moderation workflow. Requires admin:full permission.
get.summary: List reviews in the moderation queue (admin only)

patch.description: Approves or rejects a pending review. Requires admin:full permission.

post.description:
Uploads an image to object storage and returns its public URL.
Accepts PNG, JPEG, WebP, and SVG up to 2MB. Requires admin:full permission.
Sends a password reset email if an account with the given email exists. Always returns 200 to prevent email enumeration.
Exchange a Google OAuth authorization code for a session. Creates a new user if one doesn't exist.
Validate credentials, create a new session, and set a session cookie.
Delete the current session and clear the session cookie.
Create a new user account, assign default permissions, and queue an activation email.
Deletes any existing verification token for the authenticated user and queues a new verification email.
Validates a password reset token and sets a new password. Revokes all existing sessions.
post.summary: Reset password using a reset token

get.description: Verify a user's email address using the activation token sent by email.

302.description: Redirect to frontend failure page on invalid/expired token

get.description: List employer hub profiles with filtering, search, and pagination

parameters.description: Full-text search across name, overview, industry, and location
parameters.name: q

parameters.description: Sort field: name, created_at (prefix with - for descending)
parameters.name: sort

get.description: Get a full employer hub profile by slug
List assessment profiles for an employer
List approved community reviews for an employer
Returns API status and environment info
Returns the user associated with the current session, including their permissions.

delete.description:
Soft-deletes the user's account. The account becomes
inaccessible immediately and is permanently removed after
30 days. The user can recover by logging in within the
grace period (a separate undelete endpoint, not exposed
in this version — they'd contact support).

patch.description: Update the authenticated user's profile fields. Email cannot be changed.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's tracked applications with pagination and optional status filter.
get.summary: List the current user's application tracker entries

post.description: Creates a new application tracker entry for the authenticated user.
post.summary: Add an opportunity to tracked applications

delete.description: Delete an application from the tracker belonging to the authenticated user.
delete.summary: Remove an application from the tracker

patch.description: Updates the status and/or notes of an existing application tracker entry.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's bookmarked opportunities with pagination.

post.description: Add an opportunity to the authenticated user's bookmarks.

delete.description: Delete a bookmark belonging to the authenticated user.

post.description: Verify the current password, set a new one, and revoke all other sessions. A confirmation email is sent on success.

409.description: User signed in with an external provider

get.description:
List graduate opportunities visible to the public — open and upcoming only.
Closed and withdrawn listings are hidden; admins should use /admin/opportunities for the full ledger view.

parameters.description: Keyword search across title, employer name, location, discipline, industry, requirements, and description
parameters.name: q

parameters.description: Filter by computed status. Public consumers may only request open or upcoming listings (or both via 'open_or_upcoming').
parameters.name: status

parameters.description: Show opportunities with deadline before this date (YYYY-MM-DD)
parameters.name: deadline_before

parameters.description: Show opportunities with deadline after this date (YYYY-MM-DD)
parameters.name: deadline_after

get.description: Get a full opportunity profile by slug

post.description: Creates a new review in 'pending' status for moderation.
post.summary: Submit a review for an employer's graduate programme

patch.description: Updates a review belonging to the authenticated user. Edited reviews revert to 'pending' status for re-moderation.

app.ErrorResponse.description: The standard error response object returned by the API.

error.description: Can be a string or a map of validation errors
